description: Style NoteThis purple dress from femella is styled to become your new day-to-night staple. This versatile piece can be worn with opaque tights and block heels. You can also wear this with a structured jacket, the slim belt, a box clutch and heels for a dressier occasion. Product DetailsPurple dress with a layered look, is made of blended fabric, has a round neck, is sleeveless and has a concealed zipper on the left side under the armholeMaterial and CareBlended fabricWash dark colours separatelyDry inside outDo not bleach or wringWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 32”) wears a size M
